endpoint.label: GPT Image 2
endpoint.summary: Generate new images or edit one uploaded image with GPT Image 2 through APIDot's unified async submit endpoint.
endpoint.about: GPT Image 2 follows the same APIDot async workflow as other media models: submit one request, receive a task id immediately, then poll shared status or wait for a webhook callback. Use `gpt-image-2` for text-to-image generation and `gpt-image-2-edit` for single-image editing with exactly one source image.
bestPractices: Be explicit about composition, typography, and product framing when you need reliable marketing visuals or legible in-image text.
Use `gpt-image-2-edit` only when you already have one source image and want a localized transformation instead of a full regeneration.
Store the returned task id immediately so polling, retries, and webhook updates stay idempotent.

faq.question: Which GPT Image 2 model id should I send?
faq.answer: Use `gpt-image-2` for text-to-image generation and `gpt-image-2-edit` for one-image editing. The edit variant requires exactly one `input.image_urls` entry.

faq.question: Do both variants use the same endpoint?
faq.answer: Yes. Both variants submit to `/api/generate/submit`. You switch behavior with the top-level `model` field and the presence of `input.image_urls` for edit requests.

request.name: callback_url
request.description: Optional webhook callback URL for terminal task updates.

request.name: input
request.description: Container for GPT Image 2 generation or editing parameters.

request.name: input.prompt
request.description: Main instruction describing the target image, edit intent, composition, and text requirements.

request.name: input.size
request.description: Output size preset. Current APIDot support includes `1024x1024`, `1536x1024`, and `1024x1536`.

request.name: input.n
request.description: Number of images to generate. Current APIDot support allows 1 through 4.

request.name: input.image_urls
request.description: Exactly one uploaded source image URL when using `gpt-image-2-edit`. Omit this field for text-to-image requests.

response.name: code
response.description: HTTP-style status code. Successful submits return `200`.

response.name: data.task_id
response.description: Async task identifier returned immediately after submission.

errors.name: invalid_request
errors.description: Missing prompt, unsupported size, or an invalid edit payload such as a missing source image.

errors.name: authentication_error
errors.description: Missing, expired, or invalid Bearer API key.

errors.name: insufficient_credits
errors.description: The current prepaid balance cannot cover the image generation cost.

errors.name: rate_limited
errors.description: The API key is temporarily above the allowed submit rate.

sample.curl:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.apidot.ai/api/generate/submit \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <APIDOT_API_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "model": "gpt-image-2",
  "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "A premium product photo of a silver espresso machine on a clean white studio background, realistic lighting, high detail",
    "size": "1024x1024",
    "n": 1
  }
}
'

input.prompt: A premium product photo of a silver espresso machine on a clean white studio background, realistic lighting, high detail
Keep the product centered, replace the background with a clean white studio backdrop, add a soft natural shadow, and improve catalog-photo clarity
A premium product photo of a silver espresso machine on a clean white studio background, realistic lighting, high detail
